name: io.github.augiemazza/varrd
title: VARRD — AI Trading Research & Backtesting
description: AI-powered trading research platform. Test any idea on stocks, ETFs, 35 CME futures, and crypto with event studies, backtesting, walk-forward validation, and Bonferroni-corrected significance testing. 8 tools, 4 prompts. Natural language to validated trade setup.
